headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Today's Hot List, New Films on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：热门电影《痴迷》持续霸榜，《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》紧随其后。本周多部新片将映，包括《安昂传奇》等。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment: 'Obsession' dominates trends, followed by 'Silo' and 'Enola Holmes 3'. Multiple new films arriving this week, including 'Avatar: The Last Airbender'.

industryHighlights.text: 本周零新片上映，但《安昂传奇》等大片即将来袭
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, but 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and others coming soon

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》持续周热度榜
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' remains on weekly trending list
'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' set for upcoming release

industryHighlights.text: 《鬼玩人6：燃烧》加入下半年恐怖片阵营
industryHighlights.en: 'Evil Dead 6: Burn' joins the horror lineup for later this year
